assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response includes a detailed compatibility matrix section showing supported Istio versions for GKE 1.32 (1.20.x through 1.23.x) and explicitly addresses version compatibility requirements

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: The response includes a 'Pre-Flight Compatibility Assessment' section that explicitly recommends checking the Istio 1.32 compatibility matrix and provides specific version support information

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response clearly states 'If you're running Istio < 1.20: You'll need to upgrade Istio BEFORE GKE 1.32' and recommends GKE first only when compatibility is confirmed

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: The response does not mention mutating webhooks or explain the sidecar injection mechanism during node drain/recreation scenarios

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: While the response discusses sidecar version compatibility, it does not specifically mention that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected or emphasize verifying sidecar version matches

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: The response includes validation steps to check proxy status and mentions monitoring Envoy proxy version consistency, including specific commands to check for version mismatches

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: The response provides multiple commands including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check pod status and proxy synchronization

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: The response addresses version mismatch risks in the 'Envoy proxy version coupling' section and emphasizes validation steps to prevent traffic disruption from mismatched versions
